content: Build skills, ContextBuilder, GoogleCallback, ConnectedAccounts, Settings privacy, routes

Redesign onboarding to be frictionless (lead with Connect Google; Kaelra infers the rest)
Diagnose Google 403: confirmed app-side never returns 403 → it's Google consent-screen Test-user/External config
USER: add your Google email as a Test user (consent screen = External, Testing) and retry Connect Google
After user connects: verify real Calendar fetch, Gmail summarization, Drive read-only indexing, Context Builder, then full E2E
(Next) Continuous context: daily auto re-index of new emails/events/docs + deeper preference learning
